BERSERKER.desc: Enrage ability grants bonus THAC0, damage, AC, and HP but cannot be controlled. Immune to level drain, fear, and charm while enraged.

WIZARDSLAYER.desc: Each hit applies cumulative spell failure on target. Magic resistance increases with level. Cannot use any magic items except weapons and armor.

KENSAI.desc: Kai ability maximizes damage for one round. Bonus to hit and damage, bonus AC. Cannot wear armor or use ranged weapons.

ARCHER.desc: Called Shot ability applies penalties to target. Bonus THAC0 and damage with ranged weapons. Cannot wear metal armor.

STALKER.desc: Backstab ability (up to x3). Gains Haste and Minor Spell Deflection as innate abilities. Cannot wear heavier than studded leather.

BEASTMASTER.desc: Enhanced animal summoning and Find Familiar. Cannot wear metal armor or use metal weapons.

CAVALIER.desc: Immune to fear, charm, and poison. Remove Fear 1/day. Bonus damage vs. fiends and dragons. Cannot use ranged weapons.

INQUISITOR.desc: Dispel Magic at 2x level, True Seeing 1/day. Immune to charm and hold. Cannot use Lay on Hands or priest spells.

UNDEAD_HUNTER.desc: Bonus THAC0 and damage vs. undead. Immune to hold and level drain. Cannot use Lay on Hands.

PRIEST_OF_TALOS.desc: Lightning Bolt 1/day. Storm Shield ability. Bonus to electrical damage spells. Cannot use non-evil aligned spells.

PRIEST_OF_HELM.desc: True Seeing 1/day. Seeking Sword ability. Cannot use non-neutral aligned spells.

PRIEST_OF_LATHANDER.desc: Boon of Lathander grants bonus THAC0, damage, saves, and HP. Hold Undead ability. Cannot use non-good aligned spells.

TOTEMIC_DRUID.desc: Summon Spirit Animal ability calls a powerful spirit creature that improves with level. Cannot shapeshift.

SHAPESHIFTER.desc: Greater Werewolf shapeshift form. Regeneration in werewolf form. Cannot wear armor.

AVENGER.desc: Gains limited mage spells (Chromatic Orb, Web, Lightning Bolt, etc.) and additional shapeshift forms (sword spider, baby wyvern, fire salamander).

ASSASSIN.desc: Poison Weapon ability. Higher backstab multiplier (up to x7). Cannot distribute more than 15 points per skill.

BOUNTY_HUNTER.desc: Special Snare ability with additional effects (slow, stun, hold, etc.). Bonus to Set Traps. Cannot distribute more than 15 points per skill.

SWASHBUCKLER.desc: Bonus AC, THAC0, and damage scaling with level. Whirlwind-style extra attack. Cannot backstab.

BLADE.desc: Offensive Spin and Defensive Spin abilities. Extra proficiency pip. Reduced Bard Song and lore.

JESTER.desc: Bard Song confuses enemies instead of buffing allies. No Pick Pockets ability.

SKALD.desc: Enhanced Bard Song grants THAC0, damage, and AC bonuses to allies. Bonus to hit and damage. No Pick Pockets.

ABJURER.desc: Specialist wizard. Extra spell slot per level. Cannot cast Alteration spells.

CONJURER.desc: Specialist wizard. Extra spell slot per level. Cannot cast Divination spells.

DIVINER.desc: Specialist wizard. Extra spell slot per level. Cannot cast Conjuration spells.

ENCHANTER.desc: Specialist wizard. Extra spell slot per level. Cannot cast Invocation spells.

ILLUSIONIST.desc: Specialist wizard. Extra spell slot per level. Cannot cast Necromancy spells.

INVOKER.desc: Specialist wizard. Extra spell slot per level. Cannot cast Enchantment spells.

NECROMANCER.desc: Specialist wizard. Extra spell slot per level. Cannot cast Illusion spells.

TRANSMUTER.desc: Specialist wizard. Extra spell slot per level. Cannot cast Abjuration spells.

SUN_SOUL_MONK.desc: Flaming Fists and Sun Soulray ranged attacks. Sun Soulbeam at high level. Trades some monk abilities for sun-themed powers.

DARK_MOON_MONK.desc: Frozen Fist and Blindness abilities. Can use Blur and Vampiric Touch. Trades some monk abilities for shadow powers.

DRAGON_DISCIPLE.desc: Breath Weapon fire attack. Bonus AC, HP, and fire resistance. Fewer spells known per level than base sorcerer.

BLACKGUARD.desc: Evil counterpart to paladin. Absorb Health, Aura of Despair, and poison weapon. Can use Unholy Reaver. Must be evil.

DWARVEN_DEFENDER.desc: Defensive Stance grants damage resistance and AC bonus. High HP. Dwarves only. Cannot be proficient in ranged weapons.

SHADOWDANCER.desc: Shadow Step teleport and Hide in Plain Sight. Summon Shadow as HLA. Reduced backstab multiplier and skill distribution.

PRIEST_OF_TYR.desc: EE addition. Gains Exaltation to bolster allies and Remove Fear. War domain with bonus combat abilities.

PRIEST_OF_TEMPUS.desc: EE addition. Chaos of Battle grants random bonus. Bonus to physical combat. War-focused divine caster.
